subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Hearken unto My call! Why do I hear thy lamentation and thy cry? At times I behold thee bewildered in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی اسمع ندائی ما لی اسمع حنینک و صریخک مره اریک متحیرا فی الذکر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to the people of the world, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
